title: Paintings++
description: A mod which allows you to add paintings to your game and have a nifty selection GUI to select the exact painting you want to put on your wall.
body:
![Paintings++ Header](https://camo.githubusercontent.com/6918f541ae07ee74810f4243562513aab7bba19d4a36b2cbe1692abaceca8504/687474703a2f2f692e696d6775722e636f6d2f665343636a52582e706e67)
## Paintings++

A mod which allows you to add paintings to your game and have a nifty selection GUI to select the exact painting you want to put on your wall.


FABRIC REQUIRES [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) & [Cloth Config](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) TO WORK!
## Supports Transparency (1.19+)
![Paintings++'s transparency example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6d93a00c6f982726a682ecb61aea588860cff57d.png)
_this painting is a presentation suggestion. The painting in this image is not shipped with the mod._

Supporting mod downloaded automatically when using the modrinth app ! If you're using no client at all, get it [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/transparent).

### Adding more paintings

check the [tutorial](https://github.com/ArtixAllMighty/Paintings--/wiki/Adding-Paintings-1.16-and-up) on the wiki.

You can also use the Painting Pack Maker: a visual interface to make Painting Packs for minecraft versions 1.17 and up.
[Visit the Project page of PPM here](https://github.com/AbsolemJackdaw/PaintingPackMaker).
Download available on the project page.  
ppm_example.png

### Painting Resource Packs

Have you made a pack ? Want to share it with the world ? Post a resourcepack on curseforge
You can always pm me, or put the link in the comments and I will feature your Pack on here !
Absolem Jackdaw Basic Painting Pack

The base paintings got yeeted out of the base mod in 1.20.4 (12.0.0.5 and onward) and can be added as a painting resourcepack for 100% customizability! 

Resourcepack prior to 1.21  
https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/painting++-base-painting-pack

Datapack 1.21 and up  
https://modrinth.com/datapack/absolems-base-painting-pack


want your pack featured ? comment a link or pm me !

Questions ? Painting Pack issues ? Contact me on discord !!
